[使用AI网关迁移Claude Code模型-API 网关-阿里云](https://help.aliyun.com/document_detail/2980131.html)\n\n# 阿里云百炼 Claude Code 配置指南\n\n## 环境变量配置\n\n根据用户类型，配置方式分为两种：[1][3][4]\n\n**按量付费用户**：[3]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic\nANTHROPIC_API_KEY=YOUR_DASHSCOPE_API_KEY\nANTHROPIC_MODEL=qwen3.5-plus\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Coding Plan用户**：[1][4]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://coding-intl.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic\nANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN=YOUR_API_KEY\nANTHROPIC_MODEL=qwen3.5-plus\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 配置文件位置\n\n**macOS/Linux**：&#96;~/.claude/settings.json&#96;[1][4]\n\n**Windows**：&#96;%USERPROFILE%\\.claude\\settings.json&#96;[3]\n\n配置文件示例：[1][4]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n    \"env\": {\n        \"ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN\": \"YOUR_API_KEY\",\n        \"ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL\": \"https://coding-intl.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic\",\n        \"ANTHROPIC_MODEL\": \"qwen3.5-plus\"\n    }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 关键配置步骤\n\n1. 在&#96;~/.claude.json&#96;中设置&#96;hasCompletedOnboarding&#96;为&#96;true&#96;，避免连接错误[1][4]\n2. 配置后需重新打开终端使环境变量生效[1][4]\n3. 输入&#96;/status&#96;命令验证配置正确性[1][4]\n\n## API 代理方案\n\n支持通过兼容 OpenAI/Anthropic 协议的 API 网关进行代理，如灵芽 API 等第三方网关，配置时替换&#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96;为网关地址即可。[2][5]\n\n## 支持的模型\n\n包括千问Max、Plus、Flash、Turbo、Coder系列等，具体可根据任务复杂度选择。[3]",

[[BUG] Support ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL · Issue #565 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/565)\n3. [Request: Custom Claude API Endpoint Support · Issue #216 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/216)\n4. [[BUG] Interactive mode ignores ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, connects directly to api.anthropic.com · Issue #36998 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/36998)\n5. [[BUG] Can't use claude behind tunnel proxy · Issue #2256 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/2256)\n\n# Claude Code with Custom Base URL and Proxy Issues\n\n## ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL Support\n\nClaude Code does support &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96; environment variable for routing requests through custom endpoints or proxies.[2][3] However, there are caveats:\n\n- **Print mode (&#96;claude -p&#96;) works correctly** with &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96;[4]\n- **Interactive mode (&#96;claude&#96;) may ignore the setting** and connect directly to &#96;api.anthropic.com&#96; for startup operations like org lookups and auth validation, even when &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96; is set[4]\n\n## Common Configuration Methods\n\n- Set &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96; environment variable[2][3]\n- Set &#96;ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN&#96; for custom endpoints[3]\n- Use &#96;HTTP_PROXY&#96; or &#96;HTTPS_PROXY&#96; as fallback options[3]\n\n## ERR_BAD_REQUEST Issues with Proxies\n\nThe &#96;ERR_BAD_REQUEST&#96; error when using proxy services like 百炼 (Bailian) or other APIs typically stems from:[1]\n\n- **System parameter format mismatch**: Some proxy APIs expect the &#96;system&#96; parameter as a string rather than an array object, which Claude Code may send in array format[1]\n- **Request body format incompatibility**: The JSON structure sent by Claude Code may differ from what the proxy service expects[1]\n\n## Workarounds for Interactive Mode\n\nFor isolated network environments, use these environment variables to prevent startup connections that bypass &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96;:[4]\n- &#96;CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=1&#96;\n- &#96;CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_FAST_MODE_NETWORK_ERRORS=1&#96;",
      "title": "Web search results for query: Claude Code ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL 百炼 bailian proxy api ERR_BAD_REQUEST"

}

[解决：claude code 无法连接到 Anthropic 服务](https://blog.csdn.net/weixin_63481500/article/details/149750768)\n3. [Claude Code settings - Claude Code Docs](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/settings)\n4. [问题解决（排障） | AI精品店](https://docs.codexzh.com/claude-code/troubleshooting)\n5. [401 error on session start: Claude Code tries default model before loading user settings · Issue #36468 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/36468)\n\n# Claude Code Connection Issues and Solutions\n\n## The \"Unable to connect to Anthropic services\" Error\n\nWhen Claude Code displays the error \"Unable to connect to Anthropic services\" or \"Failed to connect to api.anthropic.com: ERR BAD REQUEST,\" this is often resolved by modifying the &#96;~/.claude.json&#96; file.[1][2]\n\n## Key Configuration Steps\n\n### For Aliyun Bailian (百炼) Integration\n\nTo deploy Claude Code through Aliyun's Bailian platform, configure &#96;~/.claude/settings.json&#96; with:[1]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"env\": {\n    \"ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN\": \"YOUR_API_KEY\",\n    \"ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL\": \"https://coding.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic\",\n    \"ANTHROPIC_MODEL\": \"qwen3.5-plus\"\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### The Critical hasCompletedOnboarding Setting\n\nTo resolve connection errors, you must edit &#96;~/.claude.json&#96; (not settings.json) and add the &#96;hasCompletedOnboarding&#96; field at the top level:[1][2]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"hasCompletedOnboarding\": true\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Important:** This field must be placed at the top level and not nested within other fields. This prevents the \"Unable to connect to Anthropic services\" error on startup.[1]\n\n## Troubleshooting Tips\n\n- Restart your terminal after modifying configuration files for changes to take effect[1][4]\n- Verify that &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96; includes &#96;https://&#96; and is spelled correctly[4]\n- Ensure API keys are copied completely without extra spaces or line breaks[4]\n- Use &#96;/status&#96; command to confirm model, Base URL, and API Key configuration[1]",

```json
{
  "isFinal": true,
  "references": [
    {
      "chunk": "Links:\n1. [[BUG] Interactive mode ignores ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, connects directly to api.anthropic.com · Issue #36998 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/36998)\n2. [Interactive mode - Claude Code Docs](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/interactive-mode)\n3. [Data usage - Claude Code Docs](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/data-usage)\n4. [[BUG] WebFetch fails silently without permission prompt when using custom ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL · Issue #24921 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/24921)\n5. [MCP: &#96;disabled: true&#96; does not prevent HTTP connection attempts at startup · Issue #28475 · anthropics/claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/28475)\n\n# Claude Code Environment Variables for Network Isolation\n\n## CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC\n\nThis environment variable disables non-essential startup connections in Claude Code's interactive mode. It was introduced as a solution to allow interactive mode to work correctly behind proxies when using a custom &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96;.[1]\n\n**Resolution for ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL bypass issue:**\n\nThe primary issue was that interactive mode (&#96;claude&#96;) made direct connections to &#96;api.anthropic.com&#96; on startup, ignoring the &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96; environment variable, while print mode (&#96;claude -p&#96;) correctly respected it. This prevented Claude Code from running in isolated network environments like Kubernetes pods with iptables egress rules or corporate networks with API gateways.[1]\n\n**Solution:**\n\nSetting the following environment variables resolved the issue:[1]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nCLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=1\nCLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_FAST_MODE_NETWORK_ERRORS=1\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThese variables prevent startup connections (autoupdater, Sentry, Statsig, org-status check) that bypass &#96;ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL&#96;, allowing interactive mode to work correctly behind a proxy with network isolation.[1]\n\n**Additional context:**\n\nThe survey feature is also disabled when &#96;CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC&#96; is set, along with disabling feedback surveys.[3]\n\n**Bug status:** The original issue was closed as resolved in March 2026.[1]",
      "title": "Web search results for query: Claude Code CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC interactive mode ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL bypass 2025 2026"
    }
  ],
  "rejected": false
}
```

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high)**_

根据搜索到的信息，你的问题出在 **Claude Code 交互模式启动时会绕过 `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`，直接尝试连接 `api.anthropic.com`**。以下是完整的解决方案：

---

## 需要做两件事

### 1. 设置 `hasCompletedOnboarding`

编辑 `~/.claude.json` 文件（注意是 `.claude.json`，不是 `settings.json`），在顶层添加：

```json
{
  "hasCompletedOnboarding": true
}
```

如果文件已有其他内容，把 `"hasCompletedOnboarding": true` 加到顶层即可。这可以跳过启动时的 onboarding 流程，避免它直接连接 `api.anthropic.com`。

### 2. 禁用非必要的启动网络请求

Claude Code 交互模式启动时会发起一些非必要的请求（自动更新检查、Sentry、统计、组织状态查询等），这些请求会**绕过** `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` 直接连接 `api.anthropic.com`，导致在国内网络下报错。

在 `~/.claude/settings.json` 中配置以下环境变量：

```json
{
  "env": {
    "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN": "你的百炼API_KEY",
    "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic",
    "ANTHROPIC_MODEL": "qwen3.5-plus",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC": "1",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_FAST_MODE_NETWORK_ERRORS": "1"
  }
}
```

> **注意**：`ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` 的值取决于你的用户类型：
> - **按量付费用户**：`https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic`
> - **Coding Plan 用户**：`https://coding-intl.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic` 或 `https://coding.dashscope.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic`
> 
> 另外如果你用的是 **按量付费**，环境变量应该用 `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` 而不是 `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN`。

### 3. 重启终端

修改完配置后，**关闭并重新打开终端**，然后再运行 `claude`。

---

## 验证

启动成功后，输入 `/status` 命令，检查显示的 Model、Base URL 和 API Key 是否正确指向百炼的 endpoint。

---

## 总结

根本原因是 Claude Code 的交互模式在启动时会发起一些直接连接 `api.anthropic.com` 的请求，即使你设置了 `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` 也会绕过。通过设置 `hasCompletedOnboarding: true` 和 `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=1` 这两个关键配置，可以阻止这些直连请求，让所有流量都走百炼的代理。

---

我看到你的配置了。有两个问题：

1. **`~/.claude.json` 中缺少 `hasCompletedOnboarding: true`**
2. **缺少禁用非必要网络流量的环境变量**
3. **环境变量放在了 `~/.claude.json` 而不应该放在那里** — `env` 配置应该只在 `~/.claude/settings.json` 中

另外我注意到你的 API Key 暴露在这里了，建议完成配置后考虑轮换一下这个 key。

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high)**_

配置已完成。做了以下改动：

### `~/.claude.json`
- **移除了** 错误放置的 `env` 块（环境变量不应该在这个文件里）
- **添加了** `"hasCompletedOnboarding": true`，跳过启动时的 onboarding 流程，避免直连 `api.anthropic.com`

### `~/.claude/settings.json`
- **新增了** `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC: "1"` — 禁用启动时绕过代理直连 Anthropic 的非必要请求（自动更新、Sentry、统计等）
- **新增了** `CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_FAST_MODE_NETWORK_ERRORS: "1"` — 跳过快速模式下的网络错误

### 下一步

1. **关闭当前终端，重新打开一个新终端**
2. 运行 `claude` 启动 Claude Code
3. 启动后输入 `/status` 验证配置是否生效

另外提醒一下：你的 API Key 在对话中暴露了，建议去百炼控制台重新生成一个新的 key 并替换掉。

_**Agent (claude-4.6-opus-high)**_

好的，我已经了解了 NanoClaw 的全貌。让我给你简单介绍一下：

## NanoClaw 是什么

NanoClaw 是一个**个人 AI 助手系统**。它让你通过 WhatsApp、Telegram、Slack、Discord 等聊天平台与 Claude 对话，Claude Agent 运行在隔离的 Linux 容器中（Docker 或 Apple Container），安全性很高。

核心功能：
- **多渠道消息** — 通过聊天 app 跟你的 AI 助手对话
- **容器隔离** — 每个 agent 运行在独立容器中，只能访问你挂载的目录
- **定时任务** — 可以让助手定期执行任务并汇报
- **独立记忆** — 每个群组/对话都有自己的记忆文件
- **Web 访问** — 搜索和浏览网页

## 如何安装

按照项目设计，安装过程是通过 Claude Code 引导完成的。步骤是：

1. 在项目目录下运行 `claude`（你已经配置好百炼了）
2. 在 Claude Code 提示符中输入 `/setup`
3. Claude Code 会自动引导你完成所有步骤

### 安装过程大致包括：
1. **Git/Fork 配置** — 确保你有自己的 fork
2. **Node.js 和依赖安装** — 自动处理
3. **容器运行时** — 选择 Docker 或 Apple Container（macOS）
4. **Anthropic 凭据** — 通过 OneCLI 管理 API key
5. **消息渠道** — 选择 WhatsApp/Telegram/Slack/Discord
6. **启动服务** — 配置为后台服务运行

### 前置条件
- **macOS 或 Linux**
- **Node.js 20+**
- **Claude Code**（你已经装好了）
- **Docker** 或 **Apple Container**（macOS）

你想现在开始安装吗？如果是的话，你可以打开一个终端，进入这个项目目录运行 `claude`，然后输入 `/setup` 开始。或者如果你有什么具体的疑问，我可以先帮你解答。
